m1.text: Hey Alex, I've reviewed the latest milestone. Great work!
Thanks Sarah! Glad you like it. I've already started on the next set of features.
Perfect! I'll review the milestone and get back to you.
Also, could we add a dark mode toggle?

m2.text: Hey Marcus, are you available for a quick call about the API integration?
Sounds good, let me know when you're free.

m3.text: The payment for milestone 3 has been released.

m4.text: Deploy script is ready. Need you to review it.
On it! I'll check it out tonight.

m5.text: Great working with you! Let's do another project.

m6.text: I can start on Monday. Let me know the details.
